title: What is the Mishpat of household? It seems peculiarly associated with heart?

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: is it associated with the tent and space of identity and wife and creation which is being waxed strengthened augmented to fullness, being made strong and courageous Circa Joshua 1:7? like is the work of the heart to fuel people being strong and courageous, potent forceful and indomitable forward driving? inspiring them? breathing life into them?
